meaning: n.男女合校大学中的女生adj.男女同学的,男女兼收的,对男女都开放的
examples: He was educated at a coed high school.
You have a choice of coed or single-sex swimming exercise classes.
Four classrooms in each grade remained coed.
It has one coed outdoor bath, rotenburo, and two indoors: one for men, one for women.
In another incident on Saturday a helicopter was called out when a woman fell at Drws-y-Coed.
